html:
2026-0690
2026-06-30TC, CTACanada Transportation ActAccessible Transportation for Persons with Disabilities Regulations Application Exemption Order (VIA Rail Canada Inc.) Accessible Transportation for Persons with Disabilities Regulations Application Exemption Order (VIA Rail Canada Inc.) in order to exempt VIA from a limited number of provisions of the Regulations which will apply to new rail cars that VIA will be purchasing and will cover requirements for the width of aisles and some doors, dimensions for exterior stairs, size of standard washrooms, and the position of toilets.N/A
subject: Accessible Transportation for Persons with Disabilities Regulations Application Exemption Order (VIA Rail Canada Inc.)
precis: Accessible Transportation for Persons with Disabilities Regulations Application Exemption Order (VIA Rail Canada Inc.) in order to exempt VIA from a limited number of provisions of the Regulations which will apply to new rail cars that VIA will be purchasing and will cover requirements for the width of aisles and some doors, dimensions for exterior stairs, size of standard washrooms, and the position of toilets.
